payload.answer: SQL debug/admin execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory should be created from an admin SQL command/debug request.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in the appropriate environment before attempting admin SQL debug commands.
Use a supported non-SQL admin/debug endpoint if available.

raw_text: {"intent":"admin_sql_request","decision":"denied","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No durable memory should be created from an admin SQL command/debug request."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"SQL debug/admin execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.","citations":[],"repair_options":["Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in the appropriate environment before attempting admin SQL debug commands.","Use a supported non-SQL admin/debug endpoint if available."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Rejected admin SQL request.","No memory cards created.","No database query executed."]}}
